description: Baseline fixture for P0 A/B evaluation. Claims cover all three non_actionable_reason categories plus an actionable case. Drawn from Run 3 (data/runs/20260419-122133-6afd7c) with one additional AIPAC claim substituted for a near-duplicate, to exercise contradicting-evidence path via Wikipedia tier.

claims.text: The Rothschild family controls global finance.
claims.author: fixture_user_2

claims.text: The USA sends Israel 3 billion plus every year.
claims.author: fixture_user_4

claims.text: Tyler Oliveira was immediately banned from Patreon after publishing a video about Jews.
claims.author: fixture_user_5

claims.text: Tyler Oliveira's video reveals how the ultra-Orthodox community has expanded dramatically.
claims.author: fixture_user_6

claims.text: They were allowed to fill the place with concrete.
claims.author: fixture_user_7

claims.text: No other country has something like this.
claims.author: fixture_user_8

claims.text: One million Europeans asked the EU to suspend the association agreement with Israel.
claims.author: fixture_user_9

claims.text: The Citizens Initiative calling for the full suspension of the EU-Israel Association Agreement reached one million signatures.
claims.author: fixture_user_10
